title: dalbergiella gossweileri
intro: Dalbergiella gossweileri, also known as the Gossweiler's bush-pea, is a species of flowering plant in the legume family, Fabaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Dalbergiella gossweileri include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can help to reduce pain and inflammation, and fight off infections. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions and decoctions, are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
